# CRISP Content Engine, extended reference

See https://crisp.you/llms.txt for the primary summary.

## Core pages

Homepage: https://crisp.you/
Pricing: https://crisp.you/pricing
How it works: https://crisp.you/how-it-works
Use cases hub: https://crisp.you/use-cases
Blog: https://crisp.you/blog
Contact: https://crisp.you/contact

## Homepage

CRISP Content Engine helps founders, consultants, agencies and lean teams build consistent visibility without burning out. The homepage explains the content system stack: brand profile, strategy-led generation, content queue, human review, export and auto-publishing paths, AI image prompts and future reporting.

Start free at https://app.crispdigital.io with no credit card required.

## Pricing

- Starter: Free forever, export workflows, manual posting, no credit card
- Creator: $15/month, LinkedIn auto-publish where connected, X export, blog articles
- Growth: $29/month, LinkedIn and Meta auto-publish where connected, higher volume
- Pro: $49/month, up to 3 brands, higher volume
- Scale: Custom limits, seats and onboarding via enquiries@crispdigital.io

Billing: https://app.crispdigital.io/billing
